title: DIVERSify: Designing InnoVative plant teams for Ecosystem Resilience and agricultural Sustainability
subtitle: Trouble Shooting Matrix of PAT practical solutions (Report, Public)
description: A troubleshooting guide presenting machinery, product and precision agriculture technology (PAT) solutions to overcome practical barriers in implementing multi-species plant teams. It categorises solutions for unstructured and structured cropping designs by barrier type and accessibility level.
